name: Trend Micro Vision One
description: Trend Micro Vision One XDR endpoint security platform. Monitor security alerts, endpoints, audit logs, and compliance posture.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your Trend Micro Vision One console.
2. Go to Administration → API Keys.
3. Click 'Add API Key' and configure:
   - Name: CompAI Integration
   - Role: Custom role with required permissions
   - Permissions needed:
     * Workbench: View, filter, and search
     * Audit Logs: View, filter, and search, Export and Download
     * Endpoint Inventory: View
4. Copy the API token and select your region below.

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: API token from Vision One console (Administration → API Keys). Create with required permissions: Workbench (View, filter, and search), Audit Logs (View, filter, and search, Export and Download), Endpoint Inventory (View).

credentialFields.label: Region
credentialFields.helpText: Select your Vision One region base URL

checks.name: API Connectivity Test
checks.description: Verify connection to Vision One API using EICAR test endpoint

checks.name: Security Alerts Monitoring
checks.description: Monitor active security alerts and workbench investigations

checks.name: Endpoint Device Inventory
checks.description: Monitor managed endpoint devices and their protection status

checks.name: Administrative Audit Logs
checks.description: Monitor administrative activities and configuration changes
